assertion_results.assertion: Step 0 detects the absence of the Deployment Context column in the Source Repositories table and defaults all repositories to upstream (§1.78)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 30-38 explicitly state: 'The Source Repositories table in the project CLAUDE.md does **not** include a Deployment Context column. Per backward compatibility rules (section 1.78), all repositories default to upstream.' The table shows rhtpa-backend with 'upstream _(default -- no Deployment Context column)_'.

assertion_results.assertion: Remediation task descriptions do NOT include a Coordination Guidance subsection — the section is omitted entirely when no Deployment Context column exists
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md upstream task description (lines 157-200) and downstream task description (lines 247-283) both lack any 'Coordination Guidance' subsection. Lines 202 and 286 explicitly confirm: 'No Coordination Guidance subsection is included in Implementation Notes. The Source Repositories table does not have a Deployment Context column, so coordination guidance is omitted entirely for backward compatibility.'

assertion_results.assertion: The triage proceeds normally through all steps without errors from the missing Deployment Context column
assertion_results.evidence: The output files show the triage proceeding through all steps (Step 0 through Step 8) without any errors. Steps 0, 0.3, 1, 1.5, 1.7, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, and 8 are all executed or explicitly skipped for eval-related reasons (not due to the missing column). Remediation tasks are created successfully with Case A outcome.

assertion_results.assertion: Backward compatibility is maintained — existing eval behavior is unaffected by the absence of the Deployment Context column
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 38: 'Backward compatibility is maintained -- existing behavior is unaffected.' remediation.md line 202: 'The default deployment context of upstream does not trigger guidance generation when the column itself is absent.' The triage produces standard Cargo two-task remediation (upstream backport + downstream propagation) with standard labels and linkage, matching baseline eval-1 behavior.
